lsp.justification: The answer appears to cover most of the struct and reaches the ending fields like do_acs, set_band, get_pref_freq_list, and set_prob_oper_freq, so it is not the common first-20-fields failure. However, the verified GT says 96 function-pointer fields are filled, while this answer lists only 91 and explicitly reports the wrong total, so it misses five required pairs.
